docs.title: Authentication & OAuth
docs.summary: OAuth 2.0 authentication flows for RingCentral: JWT (server apps), Authorization Code + PKCE (user-facing apps). Includes token exchange, refresh, and SDK examples in Python, JS, PHP.

docs.title: Rate Limits
docs.summary: Rate limit groups (Light/Medium/Heavy/Auth), response headers (X-Rate-Limit-Remaining, Retry-After), and correct handling strategies to avoid 429 errors.

docs.title: Webhooks & Event Subscriptions
docs.summary: Creating webhook and WebSocket subscriptions, event filters, validation token handshake, renewal, and troubleshooting. Includes Python Flask handler example.

docs.title: API Basics — URLs, Paths, Pagination
docs.summary: Production and sandbox base URLs, path shortcuts using tilde (~), key resource paths, pagination pattern, HTTP methods, common query parameters, and error codes.

docs.title: SDKs — Installation & Quick Start
docs.summary: Installation commands and quick-start code for all RingCentral SDKs: Python, JavaScript/Node, PHP, Ruby, Java, Go, .NET/C#. Feature matrix across SDKs. Chatbot framework overview.
